prompt: Create a photorealistic lifestyle portrait of an adult young East Asian woman lying on a bed in soft morning sunlight, viewed from a slightly elevated overhead angle like an intimate candid smartphone photo. She has short layered blonde hair with wispy bangs, fair skin, minimal natural makeup, and a calm thoughtful expression while gazing off to the side. Her right hand rests lightly near her lips and chin, and her left arm is bent above her head on the pillow. She wears a simple plain slightly wrinkled white T-shirt. The setting is a bright minimalist bedroom with exactly 2 white pillows, white bedding, and a sunlit window on the right with sheer white curtains; warm light creates realistic highlights on her hair, face, arm, and shirt, with gentle shadows and soft fabric texture. Use a close crop from head to mid-torso, natural skin detail, shallow depth of field, subtle lens distortion, realistic color grading, no visible text, no jewelry, no exaggerated posing, no watermark.
